description: Consistency / Visibility contracts for Milvus v2.6.10

contracts.name: Insert Return vs Storage Visibility
contracts.statement: insert() returns immediately, but storage_count visibility requires flush

contracts.name: Storage-Visible vs Search-Visible Relationship
contracts.statement: flush enables storage-visible count; search-visible requires index update (separate from flush)
postconditions: search visibility depends on load state (separate concern)
contracts.scope_note: Focus: storage-visible vs search-visible relationship. Load state handled by CONS-003.

contracts.name: Load/Release/Reload Gate on Search Visibility
contracts.statement: search requires loaded collection; unload/release blocks search; reload restores search
preconditions: collection exists with data and index
contracts.scope_note: Focus: load/release/reload gate. Flush/storage-visible handled by CONS-002.

contracts.name: Insert-Search Timing Window Observation
contracts.statement: observe insert-search visibility within tested wait window (no strong conclusion预设)
postconditions: document search visibility at t=1s (after wait)
contracts.note: Default classification: OBSERVATION or EXPERIMENT_DESIGN_ISSUE. Do not preset strong conclusions about timing behavior.

contracts.name: Release Preserves Storage Data
contracts.statement: release() preserves storage_count; reload restores search visibility

contracts.name: Repeated Flush Stability
contracts.statement: repeated flush should not introduce contradictory visibility regressions in the tested path
postconditions: storage state before second flush equals storage state after
search state before second flush equals search state after (if loaded)
contracts.note: Focus: no contradictory regressions. Minimal evidence: storage/search state before/after second flush.
